title: add podman artifact inspect --format flag
body:
### Feature request description

Many commands support the --format flag which accept a go template to allow for easy formatting for certain values in scripts. Add the same option to `podman artifact inspect`

### Suggest potential solution

There is already a TODO in the code on where to start https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/cmd/podman/artifact/inspect.go#L29-L32


### Have you considered any alternatives?

_No response_

### Additional context

_No response_

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
